{{Quote|As you know, I have my… contacts… among the underlevels of the city.|Senator Viento|<ref name="R64">[[Republic 64|''Republic'' 64]]</ref>}}
'''Viento''' was a [[Human/Legends|Human]] [[Gender/Legends|male]] [[Senator/Legends|senator]] who served in the [[Galactic Senate/Legends|Galactic Senate]] of the [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Republic]] during the [[Clone Wars/Legends|Clone Wars]].

==Biography==
[[Senator/Legends|Senator]] Viento was present during an assassination attempt against [[Supreme Chancellor/Legends|Supreme Chancellor]] [[Palpatine/Legends|Palpatine]] on [[Coruscant/Legends|Coruscant]]. Palpatine was saved by [[Jedi Master/Legends|Jedi Master]] [[Ronhar Kim]]. As the [[Assassin/Legends|assassins]] had been disguised as [[Senate Guard/Legends|Senate Guards]], Viento suggested a [[Red Guard|personal guard]] be created for the Chancellor's protection.<ref name="R63" />

During the [[Clone Wars/Legends|Clone Wars]], Viento secretly aligned himself with the [[Confederacy of Independent Systems/Legends|Confederacy of Independent Systems]], and planned to sabotage many [[Loyalist Committee/Legends|Loyalist]] senators' [[Airspeeder/Legends|speeders]]. He also helped arrange for [[Finis Valorum/Legends|Finis Valorum's]] [[Terrorist attack of 14:9:19|assassination]], a plot which also involved [[Dark Acolyte/Legends|fallen]] Jedi Master [[Sora Bulq/Legends|Sora Bulq]] and [[Anzat (species)|Anzati]] assassin [[Sajé Tasha]]. During this [[Time/Legends|time]], Viento had been placed under the protection of Jedi Master [[K'Kruhk]].<ref name="R63" />

He was [[Assassination of Viento|assassinated]] in [[22 BBY/Legends|22 BBY]]<ref name="ERC" /><ref name="Heroes on Both Sides" /> by [[Quinlan Vos/Legends|Quinlan Vos]], a [[Jedi/Legends|Jedi]] undercover within the Dark Acolytes, who believed him to be [[Palpatine/Legends|Darth Sidious]], the [[Sith Lord/Legends|Sith Lord]] whom [[Count/Legends|Count]] [[Dooku/Legends|Dooku]] had mentioned to [[Obi-Wan Kenobi/Legends|Obi-Wan Kenobi]] on [[Geonosis/Legends|Geonosis]]. Vos had misinterpreted Dooku, who wanted Viento dead for attempting to double-cross him.<ref name="R63" />

After his [[Death/Legends|death]], Viento was [[Carbon-freezing/Legends|frozen]] in [[Carbonite/Legends|carbonite]] and placed in the [[Senatorial Tombs]].<ref name="R63" />
